headline: Broad selloff as Fed signals rate hike; yields spike, VIX jumps 12%

bullets.title: Fed holds rates, signals hike later in 2026
bullets.body: Fed keeps rates steady but projects rate increase before year-end amid 4.3% YoY inflation.

bullets.title: 10Y yields spike on Fed hawkishness
bullets.body: 10-year yield jumps 79bps to 4.46% on rate hike expectations, pressuring equities sharply.

bullets.title: Broad equity selloff amid rate shock
bullets.body: SPY -1.25%, QQQ -1.01%, IWM -0.75% as investors reprice duration risk on higher yields.

bullets.title: VIX surges on rate shock
bullets.body: VIX +12.37% to 18.44, reflecting sharp repricing of equity volatility after Fed signals.

bullets.title: Mega-cap tech hit hardest
bullets.body: MSFT -3.79%, META -5.44%, AMZN -3.46%, GOOGL -2.53% as high-duration assets suffer.

bullets.title: Growth/SaaS stocks collapse
bullets.body: NOW -5.77%, SHOP -4.54%, SMCI -4.93% as higher rates depress growth valuations.

bullets.title: HOOD soars on restructuring
bullets.body: Robinhood +8.78% after announcing workforce cuts and new $105 price target from analyst.

bullets.title: Consumer Sentiment data due Saturday
bullets.body: U of Mich preliminary consumer sentiment release scheduled for June 20; medium impact expected.

bullets.title: Yield-sensitive sectors under pressure
bullets.body: Sector rotation out of high-duration equities favoring value amid yield spike.

bullets.title: TSLA weakness continues
bullets.body: Tesla -2.05% alongside broad sell-off; no specific catalyst; macro-driven decline.

watchlistMovers.blurb: Robinhood surges on corporate restructuring; new analyst price target.
Rotation-driven; SpaceX/Tesla FSD commentary in headlines.
Rotation-driven decline amid growth selloff; no specific catalyst.
SaaS selloff as Fed signals rate hikes; duration pressure.
Mega-cap tech hit hardest on yield shock; -5.44% decline.
Rotation-driven; no specific catalyst in headlines today.
AI/semiconductor sector pressure on rate repricing.
